personal.name: mr-crm
personal.heading: Multi-tenant CRM & Donation Platform
personal.sub: A production-grade multi-tenant SaaS CRM for NGOs with subdomain-based tenant isolation, RBAC, subscription billing, and donation processing via Razorpay. Built as a modular monorepo with API, web app, and background workers.
